SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MealDraftContract.kt$MealDraftEvent.AddManualItem$/** * Adds a fully-known item (manual entry or scaled search result) without * going through QuickAddManualUseCase — the entry stays local until commit. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MealDraftContract.kt$MealDraftEvent.Commit$/** Commits the processed draft to Supabase and clears the local draft. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MealDraftContract.kt$MealDraftEvent.Process$/** Runs AI extraction on pending items and opens the Review screen on success. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TodayContract.kt$TodayEvent.OnDeleteMeal$/** Delete a whole meal container with all its entries. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TodayContract.kt$TodayEvent.OnRemoveWater$/** Removes the most recent water entry of [amount] (or the last entry if none matches). */
